strengths: ~16 years of software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of GISCollective and active community contributor (talks, workshops, OSS libraries)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research — AI experience appears very recent and peripheral
Title trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior IC; no evidence of Director-level or Principal-level influence at scale
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience versus the role's preferred profile

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Breadth of engineering experience and OSS founding
Director-level IC influence and cloud-platform strategy track record

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and cloud-platform strategy influence. The résumé shows a strong, versatile senior/staff engineer with ~16 years of experience and recent MCP/agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq, plus a founded OSS GIS platform — solid builder credentials. However, evidence of AI leadership is thin: no shipped AI products, no ML research, no advanced AI degree, and no signals of advising strategic customers or driving cloud product direction at the scale this role expects. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage in a pricing context rather than platform strategy. Fit is below the bar for Principal/Director-level AI strategy.
